name: Ooh!Media Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 14% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$1.4050. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.4950, stop A$1.1880, target A$2.4160 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
